languages.text: "...несмотря на примитивность как собственного устройства, так и своей команды, "Копье Тарсуса" сумело добраться до региона, который считался недостижимым. Конечно, это во многом — блажь варпа, чьи шторма исказили пространство и время...."

traits.locale_text: "Фрагмент судна "Копье Тарсуса". Этот корабль, несмотря на примитивность как собственного устройства, так и своей команды, обнаружил древние пространственные врата в глубинах варп-штормов на окраине местного сектора".

languages.text: "...despite the unsophisticated nature of both its own construction and its crew, the Spear of Tarsus was able to gain a region hitherto presumed beyond their reach. Obviously, this was in great measure the whim of the warp storms that had distorted space and time..."
languages.original_text: "...несмотря на примитивность как собственного устройства, так и своей команды, "Копье Тарсуса" сумело добраться до региона, который считался недостижимым. Конечно, это во многом — блажь варпа, чьи шторма исказили пространство и время...."

traits.locale_text: "...despite the unsophisticated nature of both its own construction and crew, the Spear of Tarsus was able to reach a region hitherto presumed beyond their reach. Obviously, this was in great measure the whim of the warp storms that had distorted space and time..."

"...despite the unsophisticated nature of both its own construction and its crew, the Spear of Tarsus was able to gain a region hitherto presumed beyond their reach. Obviously, this was in great measure the whim of the warp storms that had distorted space and time..."

"A fragment of the Spear of Tarsus. This ship, despite the primitive nature of both its own construction and crew, discovered an ancient dimensional gateway in the depths of the warp storms at the edge of the local sector."

"...despite the unsophisticated nature of both its own construction and crew, the Spear of Tarsus was able to reach a region hitherto presumed beyond their reach. Obviously, this was in great measure the whim of the warp storms that had distorted space and time..."

"...despite the unsophisticated nature of both its own construction and its crew, the Spear of Tarsus was able to gain a region hitherto presumed beyond their reach. Obviously, this was in great measure the whim of the warp storms that had distorted space and time..."

languages.text: “……塔苏斯之矛无论是构造还是船员，都无比原始落后，但它还是成功抵达了一片此前被认为无法触及的区域。当然，这在很大程度上要归功于变幻无常的亚空间风暴，正是它扭曲了时空……”
languages.original_text: "...despite the unsophisticated nature of both its own construction and its crew, the Spear of Tarsus was able to gain a region hitherto presumed beyond their reach. Obviously, this was in great measure the whim of the warp storms that had distorted space and time..."

traits.locale_text: “……塔苏斯之矛无论是构造还是船员，都无比原始落后，但它还是成功抵达了一片此前被认为无法触及的区域。当然，这在很大程度上要归功于变幻无常的亚空间风暴，正是它扭曲了时空……”

languages.text: «... pese a la naturaleza primitiva de su diseño y de su tripulación, la Lanza de Tarsus encontró la forma de llegar a una región que presuntamente le era inalcanzable. Naturalmente, gran parte de la travesía fue por capricho de las tormentas de disformidad que deformaban el espacio y el tiempo...».
languages.original_text: "...despite the unsophisticated nature of both its own construction and its crew, the Spear of Tarsus was able to gain a region hitherto presumed beyond their reach. Obviously, this was in great measure the whim of the warp storms that had distorted space and time..."

traits.locale_text: «... pese a la naturaleza primitiva de su diseño y de su tripulación, la Lanza de Tarsus encontró la forma de llegar a una región que presuntamente le era inalcanzable. Naturalmente, gran parte de la travesía fue por capricho de las tormentas de disformidad que deformaban el espacio y el tiempo...».

languages.text: « En dépit de la nature primitive du vaisseau et de son équipage, la Lance de Tarsus s'est frayé un chemin jusqu'à une région autrefois considérée comme inaccessible. Il va de soi que les tempêtes Warp déformant l'espace-temps ont joué un rôle non négligeable dans ce succès... »
languages.original_text: "...despite the unsophisticated nature of both its own construction and its crew, the Spear of Tarsus was able to gain a region hitherto presumed beyond their reach. Obviously, this was in great measure the whim of the warp storms that had distorted space and time..."

traits.locale_text: « En dépit de la nature primitive du vaisseau et de son équipage, la Lance de Tarsus s'est frayé un chemin jusqu'à une région autrefois considérée comme inaccessible. Il va de soi que les tempêtes Warp déformant l'espace-temps ont joué un rôle non négligeable dans ce succès... »

languages.text: "Hem kendi yapısının hem de mürettebatının basit doğasına rağmen Tarsus Mızrağı, o güne dek ulaşılamayacağı sanılan bir bölgeye varmayı başardı. Açıkçası bu, büyük ölçüde uzay ve zamanı büken öteboyut fırtınalarının bir cilvesi..."
languages.original_text: "...despite the unsophisticated nature of both its own construction and its crew, the Spear of Tarsus was able to gain a region hitherto presumed beyond their reach. Obviously, this was in great measure the whim of the warp storms that had distorted space and time..."

traits.locale_text: "Hem kendi yapısının hem de mürettebatının basit doğasına rağmen Tarsus Mızrağı, o güne dek ulaşılamayacağı sanılan bir bölgeye varmayı başardı. Açıkçası bu, büyük ölçüde uzay ve zamanı büken öteboyut fırtınalarının bir cilvesi..."

languages.text: "... trotz der einfachen Natur seiner Konstruktion und ihrer Crew, erreichte der Speer von Tarus eine Region, die bis dahin als unerreichbar gegolten hatte. Das lag natürlich zu einem großen Teil an den Launen der Warpstürme, die Raum und Zeit gestört hatten ..."
languages.original_text: "...despite the unsophisticated nature of both its own construction and its crew, the Spear of Tarsus was able to gain a region hitherto presumed beyond their reach. Obviously, this was in great measure the whim of the warp storms that had distorted space and time..."

traits.locale_text: "... trotz der einfachen Natur seiner Konstruktion und ihrer Crew, erreichte der Speer von Tarus eine Region, die bis dahin als unerreichbar gegolten hatte. Das lag natürlich zu einem großen Teil an den Launen der Warpstürme, die Raum und Zeit gestört hatten ..."

languages.text: 「...しかし、その建造や乗組員は未熟であったにもかかわらず、タルススの槍は、これまで彼らに届かないと思われていた地域を手に入れることができた。これは明らかに、空間と時間を歪めたワープストームの思惑によるものだった。」
languages.original_text: "...despite the unsophisticated nature of both its own construction and its crew, the Spear of Tarsus was able to gain a region hitherto presumed beyond their reach. Obviously, this was in great measure the whim of the warp storms that had distorted space and time..."

traits.locale_text: 「...しかし、その建造や乗組員は未熟であったにもかかわらず、タルススの槍は、これまで彼らに届かないと思われていた地域を手に入れることができた。これは明らかに、空間と時間を歪めたワープストームの思惑によるものだった。」
